attributes.description:
The color of the icon button.
The default "currentColor" makes it possible to easily style the icon button from outside without any CSS variables.
attributes.name: color

attributes.description: Tells the browser to download the linked file as this filename. Only used when `href` is set.
attributes.name: download

attributes.description: When set, the underlying button will be rendered as an `<a>` with this `href` instead of a `<button>`.
attributes.name: href

attributes.description:
A description that gets read by assistive devices. For optimal accessibility, you should always include a label
that describes what the icon button does.
attributes.name: label

attributes.description: The name of a registered custom icon library.
attributes.name: library

attributes.description: The name of the icon to draw. Available names depend on the icon library being used.
attributes.name: name

attributes.description:
An external URL of an SVG file. Be sure you trust the content you are including, as it will be executed as code and
can result in XSS attacks.
attributes.name: src

attributes.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is set.
attributes.name: target

events.description: Emitted when the icon button loses focus.
events.name: syn-blur

events.description: Emitted when the icon button gains focus.
events.name: syn-focus

methods.description: Removes focus from the icon button.
methods.name: blur

methods.description: Simulates a click on the icon button.
methods.name: click

methods.description: Sets focus on the icon button.
methods.name: focus

properties.description:
The color of the icon button.
The default "currentColor" makes it possible to easily style the icon button from outside without any CSS variables.
properties.name: color

properties.description: Tells the browser to download the linked file as this filename. Only used when `href` is set.
properties.name: download

properties.name: href

properties.name: label

properties.description: The name of a registered custom icon library.
properties.name: library

properties.description: The name of the icon to draw. Available names depend on the icon library being used.
properties.name: name

properties.description:
An external URL of an SVG file. Be sure you trust the content you are including, as it will be executed as code and
can result in XSS attacks.
properties.name: src

properties.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is set.
properties.name: target

summary: Icons buttons are simple, icon-only buttons that can be used for actions and in toolbars.
